dirtyBaselineRisks.risk: Existing uncommitted export-surface edits affect S055-S058 and must be preserved, reviewed and not silently overwritten.

globalRules.implementationAuthority: True-UX handoff only; P0 process universe and screenshot audit are traceability inputs, not implementation authority.

longScreenThresholds.over3000: needs local anchors, command-zone discipline, or an approved exception
longScreenThresholds.over3400MvpWorkflow: needs split/stepper/tabs/drawer extraction or approved exception

epic00Extraction.purpose: Create the process-to-screen-to-code map before implementation so audit findings, P0 processes and current code are not mixed by assumption.

domainCoverage.domainName: Client and Family Office Context Processes
Compliance Review, Block and Release Processes
Decision Record and Evidence Vault Processes
Review Rhythm, Monitoring and Operations Processes
Platform, Tenant and Template Administration Processes

audit.diagnosis: The document review queue behaves like a workbench, detail reviewer, extraction timeline, and audit/status page in one scroll column.
audit.requiredNavigationSummaryAffordance: Sticky step/section rail, compact top summary, return-to-current-section behavior, and one persistent command zone.

processTrace.primaryProcessJob: Extraction/review queue: select document evidence, verify extraction state, and route to sufficiency review without treating upload or extraction as evidence sufficiency.

implementationTrace.baselineRisk: Tallest base screen; queue, reviewer, extraction timeline and audit/status are still too coupled.

audit.diagnosis: Queue selection and compliance-release triage need a master-detail or filtered workbench pattern rather than one stacked mega-screen.

processTrace.primaryProcessJob: Compliance release/block triage queue with one selected recommendation and explicit blocked/release preconditions.

implementationTrace.baselineRisk: Queue selection and decision context still behave like one stacked mega-screen.

implementationTrace.baselineRisk: Decision, evidence and status cards compete with the active trigger review job.
